ogTitle: Kilmore East vs Kilsyth: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kilmore East and Kilsyth.
heading: Kilmore East vs Kilsyth — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kilmore East, Victoria and Kilsyth, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kilmore East has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Kilsyth (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kilmore East or Kilsyth safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kilmore East has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Kilsyth scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kilmore East scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Kilsyth scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kilmore East or Kilsyth?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kilmore East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
